<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Response; /** * Represents an error returned by Redis (responses identified by "-" in the * Redis protocol) during the execution of an operation on the server. */ interface ErrorInterface extends ResponseInterface { /** * Returns the error message. * * @return string */ public function getMessage(); /** * Returns the error type (e.g. ERR, ASK, MOVED). * * @return string */ public function getErrorType(); }
